name: Drowning in Flames
overview: Five years ago, Lin Wu's wedding turns into a meticulously planned bloody wedding, with her fiancé, Gu Yicheng, perishing in a fire while trying to save her. This murder transforms the innocent Wu into a ruthless businesswoman. The charred wedding ring on her left ring finger is both a mark of her heartbreak and a symbol of revenge. For five years, she uses her beauty to navigate the world of fame and fortune, resorting to any means to reclaim her family's inheritance, accompanied only by her mysterious bodyguard, Lu Chen.
